ABOUT.TITLE: Egypt's Leading IT Training Center Since 2012
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Route Academy is the premier IT training center in Egypt, established in 2012. We specialize in delivering high-quality training courses in programming, web development, and application development. We've identified the unique challenges people may face when learning new technology and made efforts to provide strategies to overcome them.
